title: [CI:DOCS] Include manifest example usage
body:
#### What this PR does / why we need it:

Add example usage and notes for the `podman manifest` subcommands.    I can make a similar update to the `buildah manifest` documentation once this is fine-tuned and merged.

#### How to verify it

Documentation will build successfully.  Build output must be manually reviewed by subject-matter experts.

#### Which issue(s) this PR fixes:

Fixes #8872

#### Special notes for your reviewer:

See also, the [podman.io blog post on this topic](https://podman.io/blogs/2021/10/11/multiarch.html).

comments.body: IMHO, this PR is ready to go.  We can address the issue I opened separately and make further docs changes if required.

[APPROVALNOTIFIER] This PR is **APPROVED** This pull-request has been approved by: *cevich*, *rhatdan* The full list of commands accepted by this bot can be found [here](https://go.k8s.io/bot-commands?repo=containers%2Fpodman). The pull request process is described [here](https://git.k8s.io/community/contributors/guide/owners.md#the-code-review-process)
Needs approval from an approver in each of these files: - ~~[OWNERS](https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/main/OWNERS)~~ [rhatdan] Approvers can indicate their approval by writing `/approve` in a comment Approvers can cancel approval by writing `/approve cancel` in a comment
